allow: Bash(python -c "from server.main import app; print\('Server imports OK'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Predictions for {len\(d\)} links'\); [print\(f'  {k}: health={v[\\"health_score\\"]}, conf={v[\\"confidence\\"]:.3f}'\) for k,v in d.items\(\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Sandbox: result={d[\\"result\\"]}, time={d[\\"execution_time_ms\\"]:.0f}ms, checks={len\(d[\\"checks\\"]\)}'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'IBN Parse: action={d[\\"action\\"]}, classes={d[\\"traffic_classes\\"]}, link={d.get\(\\"preferred_link\\"\)}'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'IBN Intent Created: id={d[\\"id\\"]}, action={d[\\"action\\"]}, status={d[\\"status\\"]}'\)")
Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "netsh advfirewall firewall show rule name=all dir=out | Select-String 'Rule Name' | Select-Object -First 3")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force }')

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host \('\\''killed '\\''+$_.OwningProcess\) }')
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }')
Bash(ENFORCER_MODE=powershell WAN_INTERFACE=Ethernet TOTAL_LINK_MBPS=100 python -m uvicorn server.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000)

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }')
Bash(ENFORCER_MODE=powershell WAN_INTERFACE=Ethernet TOTAL_LINK_MBPS=100 python -m uvicorn server.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8001)

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; netsh interface ipv4 show excludedportrange protocol=tcp")
